title: The Frost-and-Blossom Threshold

features.name: the-threshold-arch
features.desc-on-touch: A doorway between two states. Step through and feel winter on one side, spring on the other. Neither will let go.

features.name: the-ice-blossom-tower
features.desc-on-touch: A tower of stacked opposites: frost at the base, flowers at the crown, meeting without mixing. Both seasons hold.

features.name: the-grid-of-moments
features.desc-on-touch: A wireframe showing the mesh where one moment becomes another. Each intersection is where a season was born.

features.name: the-melting-pool
features.desc-on-touch: Water that is both ice and liquid. It holds both states at once. Touch it and feel the precision of the threshold.

features.name: the-season-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: A plaque marked with runes for cold and growth, intertwined so completely neither can be read alone.

inscription: here every heartbeat learns to follow the one before it; the frost waits for the blossom, the blossom for the return of frost—and neither one is certain which came first.

file.name: Temporal_Garden_Sequential_Log.mp3
file.note: seasons learning to bloom one after another, the archive recording the precise moment spring and winter agreed to take turns

exits.label: back to the chamber where moments were still simultaneous
into the eternal spring that frost still remembers
up to where the seasons learn to speak
